case_title: ROSARIO ORTIZ RESPONDENT VS. RICK HAUPTMAN APPELLANT

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF NOV-15-2007 - JUDGMENT ENTERED. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, REPORTER: NOT REPORTED, CLERK: DAVID V. SWANSON, DEPT. 613

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT ORTIZ, ROSARIO RECOVER FROM APPELLANT HAUPTMAN, RICK $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $135.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,635.00 NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED
RECORD REMANDED TO SMALL CLAIMS EXHIBITS RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION.(SEE SMALL CLAIMS #822281)

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL HEARING OF NOV-15-2007 IS TRANSFERRED TO DEPARTMENT 206 ON NOV-15-07 AT 9:00 A.M. BECAUSE THE APPELLANT, RICK HAUPTMAN, DID NOT STIPULATE TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM. JUDGE PRO TEM, DAVID COMMINS, CLERK CARLA AMADOR, NOT REPORTED. (DEPARTMENT 525).
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL. TRIAL DE NOVO HELD NOV-15-2007 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV. 15, 2007 BY JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, REPORTER: NOT REPORTED, CLERK: DAVID V. SWANSON, DEPT. 613

RECORD ON APPEAL COURT JUDGMENT-SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL FILED BY APPELLANT HAUPTMAN, RICK AS TO RESPONDENT ORTIZ, ROSARIO HEARING SET FOR NOV-15-2007 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525 SMALL CLAIMS CASE NUMBER 822281
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING ON APPEAL

MISCELLANEOUS CIVIL SPECIAL SETTING CALENDAR OF NOV-15-2007 - SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL REASSIGNED TO SHORT CAUSE TRIAL ON NOV-15-2007 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 613 AFTER APPELLANT'S PEREMPTORY CHALLENGE AS TO JUDGE QUIDACHAY WAS ACCEPTED.
